title: bupleurum subovatum
intro: Bupleurum subovatum, a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, is a perennial herb native to China and other parts of Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory activities, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and boosting the immune system. Bupleurum subovatum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and extracts, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
